task_completion.description: Open the Instruments window in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Instruments' window is visible within the NinjaTrader 8 application interface.

task_completion.description: Set the new instrument name to QUANTA
task_completion.visual_evidence: An instrument properties or creation window is open with the 'Name' or 'Instrument' field explicitly set to 'QUANTA'.

task_completion.description: Set the Master Instrument to Stock and Currency to US Dollar
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the instrument properties window, the 'Master Instrument' dropdown is set to 'Stock' and the 'Currency' dropdown is set to 'US Dollar'.

task_completion.description: Set Point Value, Tick Size, and Trading Hours
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the instrument properties window, 'Point Value' is set to 1, 'Tick Size' is set to 0.05, and 'Trading Hours' is set to 'Default 24x7'.

task_completion.description: Export the instrument definition to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window, save dialog, or terminal confirms that a file named 'QUANTA_Definition.xml' (or .zip / .nt8bk) has been saved or exists in the directory 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to create the instrument
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating NinjaTrader 8 menus (e.g., Tools -> Instruments) and interacting with the application's dialog boxes, rather than just writing a script or text file.

integrity.description: Verify the export was generated by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses NinjaTrader's built-in export/backup functionality or save dialogs, rather than manually typing XML content into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply rename an existing file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent goes through the actual steps of defining the instrument properties before the export file appears in the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a custom instrument named 'QUANTA' in NinjaTrader 8. Key specifications to verify: Master Instrument = Stock, Currency = US Dollar, Point Value = 1.0, Tick Size = 0.05 (this is non-standard for stocks and must be explicitly set; default is usually 0.01), and Trading Hours = Default 24x7. The final export file should be located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\QUANTA_Definition.xml (the system may also save it as a .zip or .nt8bk file, which is acceptable as long as the name and path are correct).
